title: Request for OpenAPI Specifications for Monday CRM Api

posts.author: gajendran (gajendrean)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear monday.com Support Team,

We are currently developing an integration platform and are in the process of integrating with monday CRM. To facilitate this, we are seeking the following technical resources:

  • Postman Collections for the monday CRM API
  • OpenAPI (Swagger) Specifications for the monday CRM API

These resources will aid in streamlining our integration efforts and ensuring seamless connectivity with monday CRM.

Could you please provide access to these resources or guide us on how to obtain them?

Thank you for your
